generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing depth image data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance RawPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudData
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageData
]

instance RawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollection
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollection
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data (position, speed, etc.)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that clusters raw LiDAR point clouds via DBSCAN and tracks using a Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorage : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and ego vehicle state"
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data storage in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component that collects object tracks and ego vehicle state for transmission"
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component that serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTransmissionEnabler
]

instance DataTransmissionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data transmission over Wi-Fi using UDP"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization interface for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel for user interaction to send commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity deployed on separate hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity deployed on separate hardware"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity deployed on separate hardware"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for physical actuation"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for physical actuation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo for physical actuation"
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component that converts desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for development and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for internal communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks; supports data viewing, saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for offloading ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands from vehicle ECUs to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for remote enabling/disabling of ACC, setting desired speed, sending emergency braking commands, and data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCEnableAction, RemoteACCDisableAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingDataCollectionInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving of data for later use"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of reports from collected data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using ACC system"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of speed based on distance"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to actuate the vehicle (e.g., speed, steering)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remotely enabling ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remotely disabling ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingDataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection for troubleshooting during system development"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands such as desired speed and emergency braking are generated by the ACC Controlling FE and transmitted through Data Translation. The Actuation FE converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for vehicle actuation. Emergency braking commands trigger immediate physical responses. Command validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, adhering to safety-critical vehicular standards where stricter synchronization is mandated, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific threshold."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with deviations, particularly the Physical Twin Entity hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of only resource-specific functionality as in the standard. All software components are implemented as ROS2 packages with ROS2 nodes, deployed on distinct hardware, reflecting a significant departure from ISO 23247 RA impacting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication uses ROS2 protocol, while inter-entity communication operates over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer. The system enforces a maximum network latency of 100 ms as specified in Requirement R7. Bandwidth requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data is stored on external devices separate from the vehicle hardware. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on distinct hardware components. Specific hosting platforms (cloud, edge, on-premise) and scalability mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 23247:2021 Digital Twin framework standard for manufacturing, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin into entities: Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity, each composed of Functional Entities (FEs). The standard specifies information exchange protocols and notes OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) as a possible implementation choice for FEs, though it does not prescribe specific implementation methods for FEs."
]
